# John Geddes — johngeddes.org

## About
John Geddes is a Senior Audio Visual Engineer and Software Developer based in Chicago, IL. He currently works at The Aspen Group (TAG) as a Senior AV Engineer. He holds a B.S. in Computer Science from Loyola University Chicago with a focus on Neuroethics and AI.

## Technical Skills
- Frontend: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS
- Mobile: React Native
- Backend: Node.js, Express, Python
- AV Systems: Crestron, Extron, enterprise AV integration
- Data: Python data analysis, Excel automation
- Tools: Git, Azure AD, Vite, TailwindCSS
- Security: AES-256 encryption, PBKDF2, JWT authentication

## Leadership
- Senior-level AV engineering with team leadership experience
- Cross-functional collaboration between AV and IT departments
- Project management across enterprise environments

## Projects
- Cipher Tracker: React Native habit tracking app with AES-256 encryption and analytics (cipher-app.org)
- Snipe IT Tag: Enterprise IT asset management web app (React 19, TypeScript, Azure AD, Node.js/Express)
- Chess Deck: Browser-based card chess game with local, computer, and online multiplayer (PeerJS)
- Rambler Registrar: Student course scheduling app (Python + JavaScript)
- React Native Credit Card App: Mobile credit card management application
- Weather App: Weather forecasting application
- Drink Decider: Beverage recommendation app
- Excel Workbooks: Custom Excel automation solutions
- A Tourism App: Travel and tourism application

## Content
- Book reviews: The Way of Kings, Babel, Red Rising series, The Myth of Sisyphus, How to Blow Up a Pipeline
- Restaurant reviews: Hopleaf, Sparrow, Trivoli Tavern, TAVA Fresh Taste of India (Chicago)
- Recipes: The Amazing Burger, The Best Mimosa, Crock Pot Beer Chili
- Philosophy writings on ethics, technology, and world events
